summary: Tested H7.5 - Project Workspace Hub. All 14 features tested and passing. Fixed a bug where delete modal was not appearing when clicking Delete Project button from the Hub view (modal was incorrectly scoped inside renderProjectGrid function).

features_tested.feature: Clicking project card from Project Bin grid opens Project Hub (not directly into chat)
Project Hub shows 3 panels: left (chat list), center (project overview), right (details)
features_tested.notes: All panels present with correct data-testid attributes

features_tested.feature: Left panel shows chat list with count and 'New Chat' button
features_tested.notes: Chat list displays correctly with conversation count

features_tested.feature: Center panel shows project name, framework badge, quick actions, recent activity
features_tested.notes: Title, quick actions (Open Latest Chat, New Chat, Import Files, Pull Latest) all present

features_tested.feature: Right panel shows file count, conversation count, last updated, metadata, credits, delete action
Clicking a chat in the hub left panel opens the full workspace
features_tested.notes: Transitions from hub to workspace correctly

features_tested.feature: Clicking 'Open Latest Chat' quick action opens the latest chat in workspace
features_tested.notes: Opens workspace with latest chat selected

features_tested.feature: Clicking 'New Chat' button creates a chat and opens workspace
features_tested.notes: Creates new chat and transitions to workspace

features_tested.feature: Clicking 'New Chat' quick action creates a chat and opens workspace
features_tested.notes: Creates new chat and transitions to workspace

features_tested.feature: From workspace, clicking project name in tabs goes back to hub
From workspace, clicking '← Projects' goes back to the grid
From hub, clicking '← Projects' goes back to the grid
Hub topbar shows project name with framework badge
features_tested.notes: Topbar displays project name and framework badge

features_tested.feature: Delete Project button in hub right panel opens delete confirmation modal
features_tested.notes: Fixed bug - modal now appears correctly from hub view

bugs_fixed.description: Delete Project modal not appearing when clicking from Hub view
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Delete modal and Account Cleanup modal were rendered inside renderProjectGrid() function, which is only called when in grid view. When in Hub view, ProjectHub component is rendered instead, so the modals were not in the DOM.
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved both modals (deleteConfirmProject and showAccountCleanupModal) from inside renderProjectGrid() to the main return statement of the Dashboard component, making them available in all views (grid, hub, workspace).

critical_code_review_comments: ProjectHub component is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation flow (Grid → Hub → Workspace → Hub → Grid) works correctly
3-state conditional rendering in Dashboard.jsx is clean: !selectedProject → grid, selectedProject && !selectedChat → hub, selectedProject && selectedChat → workspace
context_for_next_testing_agent: H7.5 Project Workspace Hub fully implemented and tested. All navigation flows working. Delete modal bug was fixed by moving modals to top-level of Dashboard component. The hub provides an intermediate view between Project Bin (grid) and chat workspace with 3-panel layout.
